g.title: **pkg/invowkfile** Command definition parsed from invowkfile.cue. Input to ExecutionContext.
**pkg/invowkfile** Root invowkfile structure with env config and script base path for env file resolution.
**internal/container** Unified Docker/Podman interface. Used by ContainerRuntime for container operations.
**internal/provision** Creates ephemeral image layers containing the invowk binary and modules.
**internal/runtime** Port for optional container-to-host callbacks. internal/app/commandadapters/host_callback_server.go adapts the concrete SSH server in internal/sshserver.
**internal/config** Application configuration. Used by ContainerRuntime for container settings.
**mvdan.cc/sh/v3** Pure Go shell interpreter. Powers the VirtualRuntime execution engine.
**internal/uroot** Built-in shell utilities (cp, mv, etc.) registered as mvdan/sh ExecHandlers.
**Interface** Core execution contract: Name, Execute, Available, Validate. All runtimes must implement this interface.
**Interface** Optional output capture via ExecuteCapture. Captures stdout/stderr into Result fields.
**Interface** Embeds Runtime. Adds PTY support via SupportsInteractive and PrepareInteractive.
**Interface** Provides the host address runtime children use to reach host services such as the TUI server.
**Interface** Builds environment variables with 10-level precedence hierarchy for command execution.
**Struct** Executes via the host system shell (bash/sh/PowerShell). Delegates env building to EnvBuilder.
**Struct** Embedded shell interpreter using mvdan/sh. Supports u-root built-in utilities. Spawns subprocess for PTY-based interactive mode.
**Struct** Executes inside Docker/Podman containers. Uses container engine, provisioner, optional SSH server reference, config, and env builder.
**Struct** Implements the standard 10-level precedence: host env -> env.files -> env.vars -> extra env -> --ivk-env-file -> --ivk-env-var (highest priority).
**Struct** Holds map of RuntimeType to Runtime. Dispatches Execute by looking up the runtime matching ExecutionContext.SelectedRuntime.
**Struct** All information needed to execute a command. Composed of Command, Invowkfile, IOContext, EnvContext, TUIContext, and runtime selection.
**Struct** Groups Stdout, Stderr, Stdin streams.
**Struct** Environment configuration: ExtraEnv, RuntimeEnvVars, RuntimeEnvFiles, inherit mode overrides.
**Struct** TUI server connection: ServerURL, ServerToken.
**Struct** Execution result: ExitCode, Error, captured Output and ErrOutput.
**Struct** Command ready for PTY attachment. Contains exec.Cmd and Cleanup function.
